title: Validation helper
raw_claude_review_text:
Verdict: PASS

Findings:
- [P2] packages/control-plane/src/model.js (`validateHumanApproval`) - Tenant-scope enforcement is indirect: the helper never calls `assertHumanApprovalTenantScope` directly; it relies on `validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields(optionalFieldRecord, tenantContext, ...)` to throw on mismatch. Impact: the contract advertises `enforcement_policy.tenant_scope: true`, but that guarantee is transitively coupled to the optional-field validator. Fix: add an explicit `assertHumanApprovalTenantScope(value, options.tenantContext)` call in `validateHumanApproval` for defense-in-depth and intent clarity.
- [P2] scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs / test/model.test.js - The `terminal_status_protection_enforced` acceptance gate is asserted as listed but is not directly exercised at the S11 helper layer. Impact: terminal protection is covered transitively, so the property holds, but the gate's coverage is implicit. Fix: add one negative case transitioning out of a terminal status to make the gate self-evidencing.

Residual risk: Low. The two P2s are robustness/coverage hardening, not correctness defects. Main latent risk is the snapshot-style validator: gating historical HumanApproval registry checks on `currentContractSubphaseId` makes them dead for all but their own subphase, so future regressions in earlier slices' registry flags won't be re-caught; this is consistent with the established M03 pattern.

findings.title: Tenant-scope enforcement should be explicit in validateHumanApproval
findings.details: Claude noted the helper relied on validateHumanApprovalOptionalFields to enforce tenant scope, leaving the S11 tenant_scope guarantee indirectly coupled to S09 behavior.
findings.recommendation: Call assertHumanApprovalTenantScope(value, options.tenantContext) directly inside validateHumanApproval.
findings.evidence: packages/control-plane/src/model.js now calls assertHumanApprovalTenantScope directly; packages/control-plane/test/model.test.js and scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs validate the hardened helper.

findings.title: Terminal-status protection should be directly exercised at the S11 helper layer
findings.details: Claude noted terminal protection was covered through the S10 map but lacked a direct S11 validation-helper negative case.
findings.recommendation: Add a negative assertHumanApprovalTransitionEvidence terminal-outgoing transition case.
findings.evidence: packages/control-plane/test/model.test.js and scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs now reject production_ready -> implemented transition evidence.

P2.title: Tenant-scope enforcement should be explicit in validateHumanApproval
Terminal-status protection should be directly exercised at the S11 helper layer
